summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (backend image field + migration), REQ-2 (Admin form image handling with canvas compression), and REQ-3 (ProductCard and ProductDetail render stored images with fallback). All core ACs appear covered. One non-goal (image compression) is implemented on the frontend rather than backend, which is a minor deviation.

hallucinated_features.description: Image compression and resizing on the frontend using Canvas API (max 600x800px, 75% JPEG quality) before upload
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists 'Image compression or resizing on the backend' as a non-goal. While that specifically calls out backend compression, the diff goes beyond the stated requirement of simply passing the base64 string to the backend by implementing a compressImage utility with resize logic. This feature was not requested in any requirement.
